solved.title: Puzzle Solved!
solved.message:
Congratulations! You've decrypted the message.

Should you find it, there's a secret here, but you'll need to find it yourself.

returning.title: Welcome Back!
returning.message:
You've already solved this cryptogram.

The message has been revealed for you.
returning.hint: Feel free to explore or play again.

early.title: That Was Fast!
early.message:
Congratulations, cryptogram-annihilator!

You've found a door to a secret, but it's still closed, for now.
